title: cephalophyllum ebracteatum
intro: Cephalophyllum ebracteatum, also known as the Namaqualand button plant, is a succulent shrub native to the Namaqualand region in South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Cephalophyllum ebracteatum include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions.
